title: audit — compliance evidence
description: PRIMARY compliance evidence surface. GDPR Art. 30 + SOC 2 CC8.1 change management + PCI-DSS Req 10 + HIPAA 45 CFR §164.312(b) audit controls.

controls.evidence: Every operation on personal data audit-logged with actor + timestamp + old/new values.
KMS envelope encryption of restricted-tier field values. Optional tamper-evident chain (enterprise).
AnonymiseAuditForErasedUser listener — PII fields replaced with hash placeholders; row retained for audit continuity.
audits table IS the records of processing. Filterable by workspace + actor + auditable_type + date.
KMS encryption + IP truncation + hash chain + Object Lock immutable retention.
AuditChainBroken event fires immediately on chain break — tamper detection within 24h of write.
Access to audit rows itself audit-logged. Workspace DPO sees masked view; platform DPO sees full view.
KMS envelope encryption of restricted values. S3 Glacier Object Lock immutable cold.
Every material change on every #[Auditable] model recorded.
AuditChainBroken alerts within 24h. Kill switches for KMS incidents — recording continues in degraded mode.
7y retention of change records. Rollback via HasVersions (foundation trait); root-cause via audit rows.
policies.json + permissions.json + audit-of-audit for restricted field views
KMS envelope encryption + optional hash chain
This entire module is the A.12.4 control implementation
HasAudit on payment-related models captures every mutation
